name: Fried Eggplant Strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the eggplant and cut into finger-size strips.
2. Sprinkle one strip with 1 tsp of salt; cover with water and soak for 1 hour.
3. Drain the eggplant strips and pat dry with absorbent towels.
4. In a mixing bowl, combine flour and 1/2 tsp of salt.
5. Add the egg, milk, and 1 tbsp of oil to the flour mixture; beat until smooth.
6. Dip each eggplant strip into the batter.
7. Fry the strips in hot oil until golden brown.
8. Drain well before serving.
